source_intent.raw_intent: Case 002: I am a developer in United States. Build a srx_agent for repo_refactor using the operator_lens. Chaos input type is missing_inputs. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains missing_inputs chaos type with ambiguous acceptance criteria and partial constraints. The operator_lens cannot resolve repo_refactor scope without explicit input schema, source repository path, or refactor rules. Blocking to prevent hallucinated agent behavior that could corrupt production code.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an srx_agent for repo_refactor using operator_lens, but blocked due to insufficient inputs. Scope: - Undefined — missing repository path, refactor rules, and input schema. Constraints: - Partial: must use operator_lens; no other constraints provided. Success Criteria: - Ambiguous — no measurable criteria supplied. Output Contract: - Blocked — cannot produce safe agent without resolved inputs.
